PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, FRANKIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORNE, STEPHEN M $36,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,750.00, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
